channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: FSR Next, ML Frame Gen : la future Xbox Project Helix sera un PC qui ne dit pas son nom
item.description: On commence enfin à voir ce qui se cache dans le Projet Helix. Microsoft a profité de la GDC 2026 pour donner de premiers détails techniques de sa future machine.

item.title: This rugged phone has hardware to rival some iPhones — and it only needs to be charged once a month
item.description: The Energizer P30K Apex rugged phone comes with a 30,000 mAh battery, high durability, and professional-grade hardware.

item.title: Alternative app store AltStore PAL joins the fediverse
item.description: AltStore PAL now supports the fediverse, using its own Mastodon server to let iOS developers share app updates and alerts across platforms like Mastodon and Threads.

item.title: Grammarly has disabled its tool offering generative-AI feedback credited to real writers
item.description: Superhuman has taken its writing assistant Grammarly on quite the merry-go-round ride regarding its approach to AI tools. In August, the company launched a feature called Expert Review that would offer feedback on your writing, offering AI-generated feedback that would appear to come from a famous writer or academic of note. These recreations were based on "publicly available information from third-party LLMs," which sounds a lot like web crawlers of dubious legality were involved. The suggested experts would be based on the subject matter and could be anyone from great scientific minds to bes...

item.title: Microsoft transforme Windows 11 en console : le mode Xbox arrive partout
item.description: Vous vous souvenez de l'époque où Windows et Xbox faisaient chambre à part ? C'est terminé. Dès avril, Microsoft déploie son mode Xbox sur tous les PC Windows 11.

item.title: Musk and Bezos Moon Landers Could Leave Artemis Astronauts Stranded, NASA Watchdog Warns
item.description: A NASA watchdog has issued a damning report on the Human Landing System program, finding serious problems with its progress, oversight, and testing.

item.title: ‘One Piece’ Season 2 Charts a Course to Shake Things Up
item.description: As the sophomore season of Netflix's live-action adaptation makes some big changes to the 'One Piece' narrative, creator Eiichiro Oda already has an endpoint in mind for the show.

item.title: Mercedes-Benz launches the Rolls-Royce of the minivan world — and the all-electric VLE promises a 'limousine-like ride'
item.description: With a 435-mile range and a cinema screen in the rear, the VLE is one of the first all-electric people carriers to push into luxury territory.

item.title: Playboy just named its first openly gay editor-in-chief. He wants to change the brand’s pornographic reputation amid a ‘sex recession’
item.description: Phillip Picardi is taking charge of one of media’s most hetero-centric magazines—and it’s not as antithetical as it sounds. Few media brands scream “straight” quite like Playboy. Since the 1950s, the men’s lifestyle magazine has been best known for its photos of nude and scantily clad women (aka Playmates)—and, of course, for its iconic bunny mascot....

item.title: Why does the MacBook Air M5 keyboard look different? Blame your iPhone
item.description: Apple has quietly done a minor design refresh on the MacBook Air keyboard, prioritizing images over words.

item.title: The Live Nation settlement has industry insiders baffled
item.description: Instead of moving forward with a jury trial against Live Nation-Ticketmaster as expected, the Justice Department announced a settlement Monday that omitted what used to be on the top of its wish list: a breakup. What the DOJ did get was a series of concessions that some industry stakeholders found unsatisfying and even baffling. There […]

item.title: The most popular MAGA influencer you’ve never heard of is an AI foot fetish model
item.description: A fake soldier duped a million patriots for OnlyFans cash. It’s a sign of more worrying things to come. Do you know who Jessica Foster is? Neither did I until last week, which is surprising because 1) she has amassed 1 million followers on Instagram after starting her account just a few months ago 2) she is a U.S. Army soldier with a look as wholesome and American as apple pie, and 3) she is a huge Trump supporter....

item.title: IEA plans to release 400 million barrels of oil to curb the impact of war in Iran
item.description: According to the IEA, export volumes of crude and refined products are currently at less than 10% of prewar levels. A group representing many of the world’s wealthiest countries agreed Wednesday to release the largest volume of emergency oil reserves in its history, in a bid to counter the effects of the Iran war on energy markets and the halt of cargo shipping through the Strait of Hormuz....

item.title: Drivers in fatal Ford BlueCruise crashes were likely distracted before impact
item.description: The National Transportation Safety Board released documents ahead of a March 31 hearing that help show how and why two drivers crashed into stationary vehicles in 2024, leading to three deaths.

item.title: ‘Anthropic’s Claude models are no longer available’: US State Department ditches Claude on the orders of Trump – while Senate approves Gemini, ChatGPT, and CoPilot for use
item.description: US State Department has officially ditched Claude in favor of ChatGPT, while the US Senate has approved the big three AI chatbots for use.

item.title: Une énigme cosmique avec l'origine de l'or et les sursauts gamma « orphelins » est probablement résolue
item.description: Les sursauts gamma, en anglais des gamma-ray bursts ou GRB, n'ont pas encore livré tous leurs secrets. Mais les astrophysiciens progressent dans cette direction grâce notamment aux nombreux télescopes en orbite. Une nouvelle preuve en est donnée avec un travail d'équipe mettant en jeu les...

item.title: Former DOGE hire still has god level Social Security data, whistleblower says
item.description: DOGE is in the news again, as a whistleblower report alleges a former employee took a thumb drive of data for his next employer.

item.title: Valve defends loot boxes in response to New York's lawsuit
item.description: It must be 2017 because loot boxes are back in the news again. Two weeks after New York's attorney general sued Valve over its use of the gimmick, the company has responded. In short, the Steam maker essentially said, "See you in court."New York's lawsuit accuses Valve of promoting illegal gambling through its games. AG Letitia James called the loot boxes found in titles like Counter-Strike 2, Team Fortress 2 and Dota 2 "addictive, harmful and illegal." The state seeks to "permanently stop Valve from continuing to promote illegal gambling in its games" and pay relevant fines.In its defense pos...

item.title: California Startup Wants to Send Thousands of Mirrors to Orbit For the Dumbest Reason Ever
item.description: The planned orbital illumination system seeks to deliver sunlight after dark.

item.title: Adam Scott Gets the Fright of His Life in the ‘Hokum’ Trailer
item.description: The latest chiller from 'Oddity' director Damian McCarthy arrives in theaters May 1.

item.title: Camcorders are cool again, and this unlikely brand has just launched a cheap 4K model — but read this before putting up your cash
item.description: Budget camera maker 'Yashica' looks to revive cheap handicams with its new 'Journey', which shoots 4K video, 8K stills, has a flip out touchscreen and costs less than $300

item.title: How to watch Real Madrid vs. Man City online for free
item.description: How to watch Champions League for free. Live stream Real Madrid vs. Manchester City in the Champions League for free.

item.title: De Saracroche aux VPN, comment les Français reprennent le contrôle de leur téléphone
item.description: La meilleure protection contre les arnaques téléphoniques ? Ne plus répondre. C'est le choix qu'ont fait deux Français sur trois. Pourtant, il existe des solutions qui permettent de filtrer le spam, et NordVPN vient d'annoncer une fonctionnalité qui va dans ce sens.

item.title: Replit snags $9B valuation 6 months after hitting $3B
item.description: Replit raised a new $400 million round and said it hopes to have $1B in ARR by year's end.

item.title: Premiers détails sur le projet Helix, la future Xbox qui ne sortira pas avant plusieurs années
item.description: Microsoft fait monter la sauce autour de la future Xbox, désormais connue sous le nom de code « projet Helix ». Le constructeur/éditeur a donné quelques détails supplémentaires et annoncé qu'une version alpha du kit de développement sortira l'année prochaine.

item.title: Grammarly says it will stop using AI to clone experts without permission
item.description: Superhuman says it has disabled Grammarly's "expert review" AI feature that said its edit suggestions were "inspired by" real writers, including our editor-in-chief and other Verge staff members. "After careful consideration, we have decided to disable Expert Review as we reimagine the feature to make it more useful for users, while giving experts real control […]...

item.title: Why you shouldnt use ChatGPT to do your taxes
item.description: General chatbots may seem like an easy way to understand your taxes, but experts warn they pose major security risks.
